content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.24%, Bank Nifty -1.56%, VIX +12.4% to 18.93 — sharp risk-off open with broad-based selling across banks, autos, realty, and PSU banks. However, the book is showing strong relative resilience: PNBHOUSING +3.15%, COFORGE +7.37%, LAURUSLABS +3.32%, DABUR +2.48% on FMCG/Pharma/Housing rotation. Priority is protecting embedded gains via SL trails, not new admits into a -1.2% tape with VIX spiking.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +9.5%, CMP 1077.90. Current SL 1075 is only ~0.3% below CMP — Rule 15(c) trail-gap violation, will self-stop on any tick. Loosening SL slightly DOWN to 1055 is NOT allowed (engine rejects loosening). Will EXIT instead — see next decision. Actually correcting: keeping SL at 1075 is also dangerous (flush with CMP). Switching to EXIT-partial logic via separate action."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 80,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY — SL 1075 vs CMP 1077.90 is 0.27% gap, well inside Rule 15(c) 1% floor. Cannot loosen SL down. Stock has run +30% in a month, near 52-wk high 1141.90, broader tape risk-off with VIX +12%. Book the +9.5% / ~+₹7,500 gain rather than wait for the near-certain SL stopout on any minor downtick. New fact post-entry: VIX +12% spike materially changes risk profile. R:R from here is asymmetric to the downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.2%, CMP 123.69 vs SL 121.00 — gap 2.2%, healthy. VIX spike + geopolitical premium supportive for gold despite intraday weakness. SL intact, thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.0%, CMP 836.55, current SL 825 already at breakeven. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD. Strong Q4 (+22% rev), FMCG defensive rotation today (+0.14% in -1.24% tape). SL 825 vs CMP 836.55 gap 1.4% — within Rule 15(c) floor. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Correcting prior — SL 825 is at entry/breakeven, gap to CMP 836.55 is 1.4%, leave alone. FMCG strength supports hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1356.71,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +9.2%, CMP 1380 vs stored SL 1356.71 — gap 1.7%, within trail-gap floor. Q4 PAT inflated by one-time tax benefit but core revenue +30% YoY genuine, IT relative outperformer today. Target 1420 still ~2.9% upside. No-op; converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1356.71 already a +7.8% lock from entry 1259, gap to CMP 1380 is 1.69% (compliant with 1% floor). Tier-2 IT outperforming; let it run to target 1420."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.5%, CMP 2997 vs SL 3000 — CMP is now BELOW stored SL by ₹3 numerically; SL likely to fire imminently on the next print at-or-below 3000. Defence sector -3.13% today on broad risk-off, but Q3 PAT +74% and Rs 33,000 Cr corvette L1 thesis intact. Per Rule 17, do NOT pre-empt the SL — let it fire at 3000 as designed. Recovery option preserved if tape bounces. Loss capped at -₹400 if stopped."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.8%, CMP 827.45, stored SL 820 — gap only 0.9%, below Rule 15(c) 1% floor. Cannot tighten further without creating self-stopout; cannot loosen. Day is sharply risk-off (VIX +12%). Bank/financial services tape weak. Book the small gain rather than have SL fire on noise. New fact: VIX spike + financial services -2.1% (PSU banks) is post-entry deterioration."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.8%, CMP 1445.90 vs SL 1465 — CMP already BELOW stored SL by ₹19, SL imminent. Per Rule 17, do NOT pre-empt. Q4 PAT +36.6%, UVG 15.3%, thesis intact. Let SL fire at 1465 as designed; loss capped at ~-1.7%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1600.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.1%, CMP 1624.90, stored SL 1580 — gap 2.8%, room to tighten. Tighten to 1600 (1.5% below CMP, compliant with Rule 15(c) 1% floor). Caps downside at -1.1% from entry while preserving the Zaynich FDA mid-2026 optionality. Healthcare neutral today; SMP governance signal worth monitoring."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.1%, CMP 2779 vs SL 2755 — gap 0.9%. SL tight; Q4 FY26 +47% PAT and Odisha refrigerant capex catalysts intact. Specialty chem with relative strength (+0.28% in -1.24% tape). Hold to SL or target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3%, CMP 9091 vs SL 9020 — gap 0.8%, very tight. Q4 revenue Rs 8,860 Cr record, brokerage upgrade cluster to Rs 9,700-10,500. Capital goods +0.98% with 3.3x volume — relative strength signal. Hold; do not tighten further (would breach 1% floor)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.1%, CMP 1989 vs SL 1955 — gap 1.7%. Multiple SELL ratings post Q4 (UBS, Citi, Nuvama) — bearish brokerage cluster, consensus target Rs 1,751 implies -12% downside. Thesis weakening. Keeping HOLD only because SL is intact; if it fires at 1955, accept the -3% loss as designed. Not loosening, not tightening below 1% floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "P&L -3.1%, CMP 356.80 vs SL 354 — gap 0.8%, SL imminent. Q4 PAT +30.6%, Macquarie Rs 415 target. Financial services -2% today on broad weakness. Per Rule 17, let SL fire at 354 as designed; loss capped at ~-2.9%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.6%, CMP 10598 vs SL 10440 — gap 1.5%. Q4 PAT +103%, Rs 12,000 buyback floor, dividend Rs 150 record May 29. Auto sector -1.63% today but BAJAJ-AUTO -0.07% — strong relative resilience near 52-wk high. Hold to SL or target 11260."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.1%, CMP 481.65 vs SL 472 — gap 2.0%. Q4 PAT +16%, India FMCG +9.5%, guidance raised to low double-digit. Up +2.48% today in -1.24% tape — strong relative outperformance. SL intact; hold to target 510."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1226.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.3%, CMP 1246.60, stored SL 1226 (already breakeven). Gap 1.7% — compliant with 1% floor. Pharma export at 52-wk high, +3.32% in down tape. Rule 14(b) trail mandate: not yet at +2% threshold, so leaving SL at breakeven is appropriate. No-op — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 1226, gap to CMP 1246.60 is 1.7%. P&L +1.3% just under +2% trail threshold; let it run."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+9.5% gain, SL flush with CMP (0.27% gap), VIX spike post-entry, run +30% MoM near 52-wk high. Book gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.8% gain, SL 0.9% gap (sub-floor), financial services risk-off post-entry. Book."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1600.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 1580 to 1600 (1.5% gap to CMP), caps downside while preserving Zaynich FDA optionality."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 121 intact, 2.2% gap, gold thesis stable."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, FMCG defensive rotating in."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+9.2%, SL 1356.71 locks +7.8%, gap 1.7%, room to target 1420."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP just below SL, let it fire at 3000 per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP below SL 1465, let it fire per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2755 with 0.9% gap; do not tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 9020 with 0.8% gap; relative strength signal in down tape."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bearish brokerage cluster but SL intact at 1955; let it fire if it fires."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP near SL 354, let it fire per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Auto outperformer; buyback floor at 12000."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+2.48% relative outperformance, SL 472 with 2% gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 1226, near 52-wk high, +3.3% in down tape."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TATACONSUM +6.96% on Q4 beat (+21.5% PAT) is BULLISH but at 52-wk high in a -1.24% tape — wait for pullback to 1180-1200 area for better entry. POLYCAB already held. THERMAX +14.6% gap-up: explosive but no fundamental data in research; avoid chasing on opening gap. NUVAMA +10.3% gap-up: insufficient research. PERSISTENT/INFY/HCLTECH: IT relative strength but COFORGE already gives the exposure. SUNPHARMA/LALPATHLAB/NBCC: monitor. CGPOWER 3.2x volume accumulation worth tracking. New entries on a VIX +12% risk-off open at 09:46 are low-quality — better to manage book, let SLs/exits clear, and reassess after 11:00 IST when intraday direction is clearer.",
  "portfolio_notes": "15 positions, 65% deployed — book is over-diversified and many positions have SL within 1% of CMP, which means the next downtick will trigger 3-4 SL fires (GRSE, PIDILITIND, ABCAPITAL likely). That's by design per Rule 17 — let them fire rather than pre-empt. EXITing PNBHOUSING (+₹7,512) and CAMS (+₹340) on Rule 15(c) trail-gap grounds frees ~₹107K cash to deploy after the dust settles. WOCKPHARMA SL tightened from 1580→1600 to cap downside on the volatility-prone post-results name. HFCL pending MIS BUY at 133.50 from earlier — leaving alone (not in current data, will re-evaluate next cycle). No new admits today: VIX +12% spike + sub-floor SL clustering means priority is risk management, not new exposure. Will reassess admits after mid-session if tape stabilizes and qualifying setups appear."
}
